Patch Set 4:

Hi Minh,

 + cp /var/lib/jenkins/workspace/lustre-reviews/arch/x86_64/build_type/server/distro/el8.1/ib_stack/inkernel/BUILD/SOURCES/generate_all_configs.sh .
 + VERSION=4.18.0
 + ./generate_all_configs.sh
 + cp /var/lib/jenkins/workspace/lustre-reviews/arch/x86_64/build_type/server/distro/el8.1/ib_stack/inkernel/BUILD/SOURCES/process_configs.sh .
 + ./process_configs.sh -w -c kernel 4.18.0
 Processing /var/lib/jenkins/workspace/lustre-reviews/arch/x86_64/build_type/server/distro/el8.1/ib_stack/inkernel/BUILD/BUILD/kernel-4.18.0-147.3.1.el8_1/linux-4.18.0-147.3.1.el8_lustre.x86_64/configs/kernel-4.18.0-4.18.0-x86_64.config ... Error: Mismatches found in configuration files
 Found CONFIG_GCC_VERSION=80201 after generation, had CONFIG_GCC_VERSION=80301 in Source tree

I found "CONFIG_GCC_VERSION=80201" was in kernel-4.18.0-4.18-rhel8-x86_64.config, while "CONFIG_GCC_VERSION=80301" was in kernel-4.18.0-4.18-rhel8.1-x86_64.config. Is the build node RHEL 8.0 instead of 8.1?

Patch Set 4:

Hi Minh,

I just verified the server build passed on my local RHEL 8.1 vm build node. Could you please take a look at the above Jenkins build issue?

parents.subject: LU-13178 build: Update ZFS version to 0.8.3

commit.subject: LU-12637 kernel: RHEL 8.1 server support
commit.message:
LU-12637 kernel: RHEL 8.1 server support

This patch makes changes to support RHEL 8.1 release with
kernel 4.18.0-147.3.1.el8_1 for Lustre server.

Test-Parameters: trivial \
envdefinitions=SANITY_EXCEPT="411 812b" \
clientdistro=el8.1 serverdistro=el8.1 \
testlist=sanity

Change-Id: Iee6ae3dc20c62caaac1d740b14c5877ff7bfb4d5
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Signed-off-by: Minh Diep <mdiep@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/36968
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Reviewed-by: Yang Sheng <ys@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
